Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 129ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
49ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 47ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Scenario:
Validation fails when platform username is empty
14ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 13ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should fail validation < 1ms

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 20ms
field value

currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 404,
          "body": {
            "error": {
              "platform_username": "invalid_username"
            },
            "message": "User not found",
            "code": 404,
            "message_code": 14008
          }
        }

          }

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
23ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 22ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update 56ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates
So that the merchant can receive wager update events for supported wallet modes

Scenario:
Notify merchant with a single wager update
22ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 21ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": (wager_type.normal_wager),
      "status": (wager_status.settled),
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    }
  ]
}
 Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:8082/wager/notify
    Payload:
        {
          "notification_type": "typeA",
          "notifications": [
            {
              "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
              "game_key": "PT_SLOT",
              "wager_no": "wager-1773997166024-5elq1f",
              "origin_wager_no": null,
              "ticket_no": "ticket-570ab35c-5198-4a1c-9dbd-7d9782845eef",
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "type": 1,
              "status": 2,
              "currency": "CNY",
              "amount": 10.1,
              "payment_amount": 10.1,
              "effective_amount": 10,
              "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
              "wager_time": 1773997166,
              "settlement_time": 1773997166,
              "is_system_reward": false
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": null,
            "message": "Mock success case"
          }
        }

Info

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": "(origin_wager_no)",
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.resettled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),

      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": null,

  ]

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 310ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
149ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 33ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.875

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.875

And I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 23ms Show Info +

    Payload:
        {

            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,

              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.875
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.875

And I prepare a valid amount less than the balance by 10 1ms Show Info + 
Amount to deduct: 90.875:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.875
    extra:
        10

Info 

Amount to deduct: 90.875:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.875
    extra:
        10

When APISYS requests payment with: 64ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount -<deduction_amount>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "a77f5728-a714-44dd-8ab0-fbce43ffec5a",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.875"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "dc9866ef-a400-422f-856f-ce657357e573",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }

          "status": 400,

                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"

            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 412ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet balance by settlement amount
121ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

          ]
        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 10
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 69ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "edec89dc-f23f-4565-b19f-e3ffd26af795",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997166433-mgewhk",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1773997166",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "18eb34df-4bd7-4875-a883-30116afbbfa6",
            "origin_order_no": "fd3bbf7f-c049-49f5-a041-fdd2b62c6f96",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "e362f8ca-3afe-46f1-aba1-49133f992b13"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "8f85cce8-cb5d-4277-8310-da3a9ba6f973"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "currencies": [
            "CNY"

        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 35.75
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 39ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 10
effective_amount 10
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": 2.5, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": -1, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "a82eaec2-069d-4d1d-b6b7-46db62dbbc7f",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997166556-pal0rz",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10",
          "effective_amount": "10",
          "settlement_time": "1773997166",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "aebf99a7-7e0d-44e3-977f-556588fb9c70",
            "origin_order_no": "571f0ce5-146a-47ff-9ae0-75b76e34bd8b",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "58a4ea40-1444-42b4-829a-dfb4407364e8"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "4a40c464-c8ba-4126-96cf-d50d39518cd1",
              "amount": 2.5,
              "settlement_time": 1773997166
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "c98e6e49-b96b-42bb-be53-3b57cd982ce8",
              "amount": -1,
              "settlement_time": 1773997166
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "345bdc23-8da5-4681-932c-f6131c16dea0"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 12ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "3c179fae-cbfe-4ad9-ae87-df9f2d1e6a86",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997166840-hjz1gu",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773997166",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "6eae7e26-3c83-4332-b6cf-40702d7a626c",
            "origin_order_no": "e6f1ccfe-8c97-4234-bfc6-8bcafee1853c",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "83a83561-ff91-42fe-a63f-b688d70280b5"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "3c179fae-cbfe-4ad9-ae87-df9f2d1e6a86",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997166840-hjz1gu",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773997166",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "6eae7e26-3c83-4332-b6cf-40702d7a626c",
            "origin_order_no": "e6f1ccfe-8c97-4234-bfc6-8bcafee1853c",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "83a83561-ff91-42fe-a63f-b688d70280b5"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],

            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO007 response should fail validation < 1ms

I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

16ms 2 3 2

game_key <game_key>

currency <currency>
amount 12.5

type <wager_type.normal_wager>

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/resettle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "514c68c6-fcca-4f93-9fff-72dbed461e98",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997166872-7n0vpu",
          "ticket_no": "ticket-fbda9ab3-a997-4db8-a113-9dba8e4d2082",
          "origin_wager_no": "origin-1773997166872-4aa1ct",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "12.5",
          "effective_amount": "",
          "type": "1",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "999456e2-6d58-4ded-a011-a1b4ce240072",
            "origin_order_no": "b7d5864d-21bb-41c8-ade4-89247a6c2c8a",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "f5e5b49b-5cca-4e79-8c76-c4bbdcf98e1a"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "wager_time": "1773997166",
          "settlement_time": "1773997166",
          "is_system_reward": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "86980704-56cc-4778-af57-fc6d4de127e1"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Feature:Wager lifecycle wallet correctness < 1ms 1

Scenario:
Complete wager lifecycle updates wallet correctly
< 1ms 13

Given player wallet balance is 100.00 USD < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When a wager request is made with payment_amount 10.00 < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then wallet balance should decrease by exactly 10.00 < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  callback(null, 'pending');

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the member wallet has balances: < 1ms
currency balance
<currency> 100 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given a bet exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no> 

Then(/^a bet exists with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests payment with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -30

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 70 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 70$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And a request payment transaction exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
order_no <transaction_uuid_1>
currency <currency>
amount -30 

Then(/^a request payment transaction exists with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the request payment transaction payload includes wager: < 1ms
wager_no
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^the request payment transaction payload includes wager:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 100 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 100$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then notify payment failed < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify failed payment refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 40 then notify payment failed restores balance to 90
< 1ms 8 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the member wallet has balances: < 1ms
currency balance
<currency> 90 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given a request payment transaction mapping will be created for parent wager "<parent_wager_no>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a request payment transaction mapping will be created for parent wager "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests payment with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -40

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 50 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 50$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS notifies payment failed with: < 1ms
transaction_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username> 

Then(/^APISYS notifies payment failed with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 90 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 90$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO010 Request Transfer In 437ms 8 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer in API
So that I can credit funds into the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer in increases wallet balance
73ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 19ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        30.5

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

        }
    Response:

          "body": {

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.5

            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 35ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 75.125
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "6115a3b0-23b1-4f41-a06a-41d52218f7f1",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "75.125",
          "session_id": "190d7fce-d02c-46f6-a19e-015180d0bf7a"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "c2a57148-88a2-4767-9947-f166295cfa67",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount precision is invalid
12ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 11ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "a46ac502-8c5f-46fd-a56e-3a58a5c373bd",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "9c497e83-e2cc-457a-aea5-7512c828e2ff"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "a46ac502-8c5f-46fd-a56e-3a58a5c373bd",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "9c497e83-e2cc-457a-aea5-7512c828e2ff"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should fail validation < 1ms

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount is negative

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 662ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
184ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 21ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

          ]
        }

              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

        175.625

        175.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 95ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "3cfdd91a-b80a-4c8d-bc9e-9212933d7344",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "0073734b-2185-4271-9e9b-2040241f9179"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "cf3b7c92-14b2-44d5-a0ac-12cd4c319335",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "3cfdd91a-b80a-4c8d-bc9e-9212933d7344",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "0073734b-2185-4271-9e9b-2040241f9179"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "cf3b7c92-14b2-44d5-a0ac-12cd4c319335",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 27ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    After:

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 70ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>
Show Info +

    API:

          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "84f3dc18-8a75-4805-b514-b2e7f8f40911"
        }

          "status": 200,

            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d70f1d9d-7316-450f-9bf4-5038c9dafb40",
              "amount": -15,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"

        }

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "8745d212-002f-48ec-8de0-2b3a6bf9b572",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "5d434e1c-f16d-4587-ba9d-7a32fb2c31e0"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "3806f862-5c2a-4c49-909b-a3789548bcb1",

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

          "transfer_no": "4fa224c7-6c5d-4047-9010-32d43b5d4ef1",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",

                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"

            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 295ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
159ms 9

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 73ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "a063b739-5f07-4759-b9c9-f22c83848443",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "f36a096d-a90d-49f9-9012-1bfab2efe8b4"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d5564313-337b-40ae-ad58-5c7b5a5973dd",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <cancel_reference_id>

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer wallet lifecycle 374ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify wallet balance changes and transfer reversal end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in, transfer out, cancel transfer, and idempotent cancel
374ms 21

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125

        }

          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "957bbb12-09d1-47cb-ae11-6d0bd1bd1b6f"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/cancel-transfer
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f37e4024-e6ef-483c-81e6-7248ddc09608"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "957bbb12-09d1-47cb-ae11-6d0bd1bd1b6f"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO014 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "cancel_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        957bbb12-09d1-47cb-ae11-6d0bd1bd1b6f

Info 

Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        957bbb12-09d1-47cb-ae11-6d0bd1bd1b6f

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 35 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    After:
        100.125

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
